text.title: Claude Tool Use Failure Modes
text.summary: Seven antipatterns in production Claude tool-use loops with symptom / root-cause / fix.

antipattern.description: Tool schemas with >2 levels of object nesting.
antipattern.symptom: Tool-call error rate spikes; arguments returned malformed or null.
antipattern.root-cause: Deep nesting compounds token-prediction errors at each level.
antipattern.fix: Flatten to ≤2 levels; use IDs that the executor resolves rather than full nested objects.

antipattern.description: Appending text-only to message history, dropping tool_use blocks.
antipattern.symptom: Next-turn API call returns `invalid_request_error: missing tool_use_id`.
antipattern.root-cause: The API requires the assistant turn to retain its tool_use blocks for state reconstruction.
antipattern.fix: Append `response.content` (full list) every turn; never just the .text accessor.

antipattern.symptom: AttributeError on `.text` because index 0 was a ToolUseBlock.

antipattern.description: Infinite tool loop — Claude keeps calling the same tool with the same args.
antipattern.symptom: Quota spend spike; per-task latency unbounded.
antipattern.root-cause: Broken tool always returns same unhelpful response; no iteration cap.
antipattern.fix: max_turns=15 guard + log + fail-loud. Cache tool results within a turn to detect repeat calls.

antipattern.symptom: Edge-case tool calls fail validation despite reasonable args; cryptic API errors.
antipattern.root-cause: Overly strict schema rejects Claude's harmless extra fields.
antipattern.fix: Omit `additionalProperties` (defaults to permissive) unless strict mode is necessary.

antipattern.description: Using MCP over HTTP / in a server context expecting easy ops.
antipattern.symptom: Subprocess lifecycle bugs, zombie processes, port collisions.
antipattern.root-cause: MCP is stdio-first and designed for Claude Desktop.
antipattern.fix: For server/API integrations use standard tool use; reserve MCP for Desktop scenarios.

antipattern.description: Thinking blocks included as tool_result content.
antipattern.symptom: `invalid_request_error: tool_result content must not contain thinking blocks`.
antipattern.root-cause: When Extended Thinking is enabled, response.content includes thinking; harness forwards everything.
antipattern.fix: Filter tool_result to tool_use_id + textual content only; drop thinking blocks before forming the user message.
